description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 Docker image for all jobs, caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository, and defines MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables as shown. Define three stages: test, build, and generate_version. In the test stage add a test job that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS clean test`. In the build stage add a build_jar job that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS clean package -DskipTests -Ddockerfile.skip`, stores the target/ directory as an artifact named build-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME that expires in 1 day. In the generate_version stage add a build_docker_image job that depends on build_jar and runs `docker build --build-arg JAR_FILE=target/configuration-server-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar -t registry.gitlab.com/vrcca-examples/java/spring/configuration-server .`.
